title: Domestic Unrest
description: Large protests erupt over a controversial policy.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Deploying security forces escalates tensions. Past protests showed force inflames unrest.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Dialogue didn’t stop violence either. Order must be restored before negotiation.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Order built on intimidation collapses. Legitimacy comes from listening.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Listening is pointless if the streets are burning. Stability is the foundation of democracy.
